title: Kernel 5.11 overlayfs - IO error trying to delete directories from base image
body:
```
> uname -r
5.11.0

> cat Dockerfile.rebuild 
FROM debian:buster-slim
RUN rm -rf /var

> podman build -t test -f Dockerfile.rebuild
STEP 1: FROM debian:buster-slim
STEP 2: RUN rm -rf /var
rm: cannot remove '/var/cache/debconf': Input/output error
rm: cannot remove '/var/lib/apt/mirrors': Input/output error
rm: cannot remove '/var/lib/dpkg/alternatives': Input/output error
rm: cannot remove '/var/lib/dpkg/info': Input/output error
rm: cannot remove '/var/lib/dpkg/triggers': Input/output error
rm: cannot remove '/var/lib/pam': Input/output error
rm: cannot remove '/var/lib/systemd/deb-systemd-helper-enabled/timers.target.wants': Input/output error
rm: cannot remove '/var/log': Input/output error
rm: cannot remove '/var/spool': Input/output error
Error: error building at STEP "RUN rm -rf /var": error while running runtime: exit status 1

> cat ~/.config/containers/storage.conf
[storage]
  driver = "overlay"
  runroot = "/run/user/1000"
  graphroot = "/mnt/vm/libpod/avatar/graph"
  [storage.options]
    size = ""
    remap-uids = ""
    remap-gids = ""
    ignore_chown_errors = ""
    remap-user = ""
    remap-group = ""
    mountopt = ""
    [storage.options.thinpool]
      autoextend_percent = ""
      autoextend_threshold = ""
      basesize = ""
      blocksize = ""
      directlvm_device = ""
      directlvm_device_force = ""
      fs = ""
      log_level = ""
      min_free_space = ""
      mkfsarg = ""
      mountopt = ""
      use_deferred_deletion = ""
      use_deferred_removal = ""
      xfs_nospace_max_retries = ""
   [storage.options.overlay]
      # mount_program = "/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs"
```

comments.body:
can you try adding userxattr to the mountopts?

`mountopt = "userxattr"`

We've recently fixed it to be done automatically but the fix might have not been propagated into a release yet
This works, thanks for the info
